heading: Immigration and Naturalization Service: report
label: 1322 Immigration and Naturalization Service: report
text: The number of copies, not to exceed five thousand, to be printed of the annual reports of the Immigration and Naturalization Service of the Department of Justice shall be subject to the discretion of the Attorney General.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 266 (, No. 33, ; , ; Ex. Ord. No. 6166, § 14, ; 1940 Reorg. Plan No. V, § 1, eff. , 5 F.R. 2223, ).Mar. 3, 1905June 10, 1933June 14, 194033 Stat. 1287Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 337 Stat. 73754 Stat. 1238
